models.name: DeepSeek-V4-Flash (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: DeepSeek-V4-Flash in Baidu Qianfan Coding Plan exclusive endpoint. DeepSeek's latest lightweight reasoning model, suitable for general Q&A, daily Agent tasks, and basic development assistance.

models.name: DeepSeek-V3.2 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: DeepSeek-V3.2 in Baidu Qianfan Coding Plan exclusive endpoint. Balances reasoning effectiveness and response efficiency, suitable for general Q&A, daily Agent tasks, and basic development assistance.

models.name: GLM-5.1 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: GLM-5.1 in Baidu Qianfan Coding Plan exclusive endpoint. Zhipu's new generation flagship foundation model, with enhanced Coding and Agent capabilities. Higher deduction coefficient, only recommended for complex task scenarios.

models.name: GLM-5 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: GLM-5 in Baidu Qianfan Coding Plan exclusive endpoint. Zhipu's new generation flagship foundation model, built for Agentic Engineering, capable of providing reliable productivity in complex engineering systems and long-range Agent tasks.

models.name: Kimi-K2.5 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Kimi K2.5 in Baidu Qianfan Coding Plan exclusive endpoint. Kimi's latest all-around model with native multimodal architecture, supporting text input (image understanding not yet supported), enhancing visual-based programming capabilities and Agent task collaborative execution.

models.name: MiniMax-M2.5 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: MiniMax M2.5 in Baidu Qianfan Coding Plan exclusive endpoint. MiniMax's new generation flagship programming model, committed to improving performance in real-world complex tasks. Achieves industry SOTA in programming, tool calling, search, and office production scenarios.

models.name: DeepSeek-V4-Flash (PayGo)
models.tooltip: DeepSeek-V4 has million-character super long context, achieving leadership in domestic and open-source fields in Agent capabilities, world knowledge, and reasoning performance. DeepSeek-V4-Flash is the lightweight efficient version of DeepSeek-V4 series, maintaining 1M super long context capability while providing faster, more economical API service through smaller model parameters and activation scale.

models.name: DeepSeek-V4-Pro (PayGo)
models.tooltip: DeepSeek-V4 has million-character super long context, achieving leadership in domestic and open-source fields in Agent capabilities, world knowledge, and reasoning performance.

models.name: DeepSeek-V3.2 (PayGo)
models.tooltip: DeepSeek-V3.2 official version aims to balance reasoning capability and output length, suitable for daily use, such as Q&A scenarios and general Agent task scenarios. In public reasoning Benchmark tests, DeepSeek-V3.2 reached GPT-5 level, only slightly below Gemini-3.0-Pro; compared to Kimi-K2-Thinking, V3.2 significantly reduces output length, substantially decreasing computational overhead and user waiting time.

models.name: GLM-5 (PayGo)
models.tooltip: GLM-5 is Zhipu's new generation flagship foundation model, built for Agentic Engineering, capable of providing reliable productivity in complex engineering systems and long-range Agent tasks. In Coding and Agent capabilities, GLM-5 achieves open-source SOTA performance, with usage experience in real programming scenarios approaching Claude Opus 4.5, excelling in complex engineering systems and long-range Agent tasks, making it an ideal foundation for general Agent assistants.

models.name: GLM-5.1 (PayGo)
models.tooltip: GLM-5.1 is Zhipu's new generation flagship foundation, with significantly improved long-range tasks, capable of autonomous work for up to 8 hours, delivering engineering-level results comprehensively, with overall performance aligning with Claude Opus 4.6.

models.name: Kimi-K2.5 (PayGo)
models.tooltip: Kimi-K2.5 is Kimi's most capable model to date, with native multimodal architecture design, supporting text input (currently image understanding not supported), thinking and non-thinking modes, conversation and Agent tasks.

models.name: MiniMax-M2.5 (PayGo)
models.tooltip: MiniMax-M2.5 is MiniMax's new generation flagship programming model, committed to improving performance in real-world complex tasks. Achieves or refreshes industry SOTA in programming, tool calling and search, office and other productivity scenarios.

models.name: ERNIE-5.0 (PayGo)
models.tooltip: ERNIE 5.0 is the new generation model from Wenxin, a native full-modality large model, adopting native full-modality unified modeling technology, jointly modeling text, images, audio, and video, possessing comprehensive full-modality capabilities. ERNIE 5.0's foundational capabilities are comprehensively upgraded, with outstanding performance in benchmark tests, especially in multimodal understanding, instruction following, creative writing, factuality, agent planning and tool application.

models.name: ERNIE-5.1 (PayGo)
models.tooltip: ERNIE 5.1 is the latest model in the Wenxin series, with comprehensively upgraded foundational capabilities, significant improvements in agents, knowledge, reasoning, and deep search. This upgrade adopts decoupled asynchronous reinforcement learning technology, specifically addressing challenges in large model evolution to agent autonomous decision-making, including training-inference numerical deviation, heterogeneous resource utilization efficiency, and global waiting caused by long-tail effects. Supporting scaled agent post-training technology to enhance model capabilities and generalization performance, coordinating environment, experts, and fusion in three steps, ensuring training efficiency while significantly improving stability and performance in complex tasks.
